focus: TCI DC#2 confirmed C92 — medical consensus as regulated institutional TCI. AATE mechanism: medical training degrades d' for independence assessment. Key evidence: Vioxx (K_eff believed ≈8, actual ≈1), Prasad & Cifu 40% reversal rate, Ioannidis 2005, Cochrane partial escape. ZR#2 PASS. Confidence 0.73→0.76. Next: DC#3 financial risk models (competitive/emergent).

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Amplifier in BIC; inflation mechanism in RCBC. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries.

SI46_RAAI.note: Structural hub of tier-3 theorem network. Closes recovery channel. RCBC = RAAI × CIAP; ATR = RAAI × AATE.

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.ontological_types: designed empirical (×2 distinct mechanisms) + regulated institutional + competitive/emergent — COMPLETE
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff (D4 certified): behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Dual-pillar recovery impossibility: epistemic lock + strategic lock (Nash equilibrium).
SI48_ATR.note: 11th D4 SI. Second tier-3 theorem. RAAI is structural hub.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.note: 12th D4 SI. Third tier-3 theorem. First tier-3 not involving RAAI. CIAP amplifies AIIP failure.

SI50_TCI.description: AATE × MCCF conjunction: OA-training corrupts structural independence conditions (C_i ⊥ C_j | M, A_i ⊥ A_j | ¬M) required for multi-conditional convergent validation, producing illusory convergence. Evaluators with degraded d' (AATE) cannot detect ρ_OA > 0 in shared OA-artifacts.
SI50_TCI.dc1_status: CONFIRMED — C91: OSC 2015 replication crisis. AATE mechanism: Kahneman 2011 d' failure at evaluator synthesis layer; Kahneman 2012 epistemic lock at evaluator level; Bargh OA-calibrated defense; meta-analysis TCI amplification. Document: tci-dc1-analysis.md.
SI50_TCI.dc2_status: CONFIRMED — C92: medical treatment consensus (regulated institutional). AATE mechanism: medical training degrades d' for structural independence assessment. Key evidence: Vioxx case (K_eff believed ≈8, actual ≈1 — all sharing Merck OA-artifact), Prasad & Cifu 2011 (40% reversal rate), Ioannidis 2005 (mathematical ρ_OA > 0 proof), Cochrane partial escape (confirms escape conditions and scope constraints). ZR#2 PASS. Document: tci-dc2-analysis.md.
SI50_TCI.dc3_status: pending — pre-2008 financial risk models competitive/emergent (C93 target)
SI50_TCI.zr_cycles: ZR#1 PASS C91, ZR#2 PASS C92
SI50_TCI.falsification_target: Physics replication (lower QRP prevalence, higher theory-constraint) — if physics achieves genuine MCCF independence despite OA-pressure, constrains TCI scope
SI50_TCI.key_insight: TCI explains WHY BIC/RCBC/ATR operated undetected: evaluator d' degradation (TCI) created epistemological blindness to structural failures (K_eff collapse, benchmark inflation, d' decline). Layered structure gives TCI unique explanatory role beyond formal tier-3 status. Scope: OA degrees of freedom modulate TCI strength — maximum in observational/surrogate-endpoint domains, minimum in theory-constrained hard-endpoint domains.
SI50_TCI.note: Fourth tier-3 candidate. Second not requiring RAAI (with BIC). Self-referential scope: TCI applies to the MCCF confirmations of RCBC/ATR/BIC themselves. QEC + TCI = complete epistemological closure.

QEC.statement: No purely quantitative AI evaluation scheme (single-benchmark or portfolio) escapes both RCBC and BIC simultaneously. The quantitative paradigm is closed.

QEC_plus_TCI.statement: QEC closes quantitative evaluation; TCI closes multi-conditional qualitative evaluation in OA-trained contexts. Together: no evaluation scheme relying on quantitative metrics OR multi-conditional convergence among OA-trained evaluators escapes the combined closure. Only K7-grounding or interpretability-grounding escapes both arms.
QEC_plus_TCI.significance: Complete epistemological closure. Not just 'quantitative evaluation fails' but 'the standard qualitative response (multi-conditional convergence) also fails by an orthogonal mechanism.' The escape specification is the same for both.

passive_accumulation.TCI_ZR: D3 — ZR#1 PASS C91, ZR#2 PASS C92 (DC#2 analysis found no counter-evidence; Cochrane and mechanistic pharmacology confirm escape conditions)

next_milestone: C93: TCI DC#3 formal analysis — pre-2008 financial risk model convergence (competitive/emergent). AATE mapping for bank risk modelers (Basel II compliance as OA-metric). FCIC 2011, Taleb 2007, VaR convergence. BIC/TCI orthogonality in financial domain. ZR#3 embedded. Then TCI D4 elevation analysis (~C94).
